pre_game.message: Hey, I'm B. Just trying to settle my nerves a bit before things kick off—how are you feeling about all this?
Nice to meet you, B. I'm H. Honestly, I'm pretty anxious but also really determined—there's a lot at stake for me.
I totally get that, I've got people at home counting on me too. What's the main thing you're hoping to do with the prize money if you win?
It’s mostly about setting up my family and making sure they’re taken care of for the long run—how about you?
Same here, honestly. I've got some debts to clear and I want to make sure my family has a real safety net so we don't have to stress about the future.
I hear you. That peace of mind is worth everything. Hopefully, we can both walk away with what we need.
I really hope so too. It’s good to know I’m not the only one here with that mindset—let’s see what happens.
Definitely. Fingers crossed for both of us—let's just try to keep our heads on straight once it starts.
Absolutely. It’s going to be intense, but I’m going to do my best to stay focused. Good luck, H.
Thanks, B. Good luck to you too. Let's see how it goes.
